competencies: Analyze communication systems using the ISO/OSI reference model
Configure Ethernet/TCP/IP networks for industrial use
Explain operating principles of industrial bus systems and protocols
Assess security aspects of industrial communication systems
Integrate devices and controllers into communication networks
description_en: Covers industrial communication systems, protocols, bus systems and Ethernet/TCP/IP configuration based on the ISO/OSI reference model.

competencies: Design natural-language dialogue systems
Evaluate linguistic resources such as lexica and parsers
Handle ambiguity and productivity in natural language processing
Build emotion-aware human-machine communication systems
description_en: Introduces natural-language processing and the design of dialogue and emotion-aware human-machine communication systems.

competencies: Design and implement controllers in Matlab/Simulink
Auto-tune PI/PID controllers
Synthesize robust multivariable controllers using H-infinity and mu-synthesis
Apply linear matrix inequalities to controller design
Implement controllers for real-time operation
description_en: Teaches computer-aided design and real-time implementation of robust control systems using Matlab/Simulink and modern synthesis methods.

competencies: Model electrical equipment for steady-state power system analysis
Perform load-flow and short-circuit calculations
Apply state estimation to power networks
Compute power network behaviour using MATLAB
description_en: Covers steady-state analysis of electrical power networks including equipment modeling, load-flow and short-circuit calculation in MATLAB.

competencies: Assess the impact of renewable sources on the energy supply system
Evaluate photovoltaic, wind and hydro power generation
Analyze grid integration of decentralized renewable generators
Incorporate storage and fuel cells into smart grid concepts
description_en: Examines electricity generation from renewable sources and its integration into the overall energy system and smart grids.

competencies: Develop complex power-electronic circuits from basic topologies
Explain operation of self-commutated and line-commutated converters
Dimension power-electronic circuits for specific applications
Model control strategies for power-electronic circuits
description_en: Teaches the design, dimensioning and control of complex power-electronic circuits including resonant and bridge converter topologies.

competencies: Apply power-electronic circuits within complex systems
Design power-electronic systems for renewable energy feed-in
Engineer power electronics for electric vehicles and drives
Dimension HVDC and storage interface systems
description_en: Covers power-electronic systems for renewable energy supply and electromobility, including drives, chargers, HVDC and storage.

competencies: Explain operation and dynamics of unconventional electrical machines
Model electromechanical actuators within mechanical systems
Design control for reluctance, stepper and linear motors
Project the integration of actuators into mechatronic systems
description_en: Provides advanced knowledge of electrical machines and actuators as components of electromechanical and mechatronic systems.

competencies: Apply point operations and filtering to digital images
Implement image segmentation and the Hough transform
Perform texture analysis and 3D measurement from images
Select and adapt algorithms for image recognition problems
description_en: Introduces digital image acquisition, representation, filtering, segmentation and analysis for information extraction from images.

competencies: Analyze high-frequency transmission line structures
Select and dimension waveguides for a given application
Solve Bessel differential equations for cylindrical structures
Apply tools to analyze complex line structures and discontinuities
description_en: Covers analysis and dimensioning of high-frequency waveguide and transmission line structures using analytical electromagnetic methods.

competencies: Apply theoretical neuroscience models to neural networks
Implement supervised, unsupervised and reinforcement learning rules
Analyze recurrent networks and associative memory
Write computational neural applications with visualization in Matlab
description_en: Covers theoretical neuroscience models of feedforward, recurrent and learning networks with computational Matlab implementations.

competencies: Explain concepts and methods of automatic dialogue systems
Represent knowledge in speech grammars
Build voice dialogues in VXML and Amazon Alexa skills
Evaluate strengths and weaknesses of voice user interfaces
description_en: Teaches design and implementation of voice user interfaces and dialogue systems using VXML and modern speech assistants.

competencies: Explain principles of cognitive intelligence and their computer transfer
Work with cognitive model architectures
Implement meaning assignment and data handling in assistive systems
Realize cognitive system concepts in practical programs
description_en: Conveys advanced concepts of technical cognitive intelligent systems and their practical realization in engineering applications.

competencies: Describe and analyze nonlinear dynamic systems in state space
Investigate stability using direct and indirect Lyapunov methods
Interpret energy- and passivity-based system descriptions
Design nonlinear controllers via backstepping and input-output linearization
description_en: Teaches analysis and control of nonlinear dynamic systems in state space using Lyapunov methods and nonlinear controller design.

competencies: Describe generation, propagation and effects of electromagnetic disturbances in grids
Assess the impact of renewable sources on grid power quality
Select analytical and numerical methods to predict EMC
Apply shielding concepts and mitigation measures for EMC problems
description_en: Covers electromagnetic compatibility of regenerative electrical systems, including disturbance analysis, prediction methods and mitigation.

competencies: Use measurement instruments and probes for EMC assessment
Analyze measurement limits and errors in time and frequency domains
Select suitable measurement methods for EMC problems
Evaluate emission and immunity measurement results
description_en: Teaches instruments, probes and standardized methods for measuring and assessing electromagnetic compatibility of electrical systems.

competencies: Assess boundary conditions of renewable energy generation
Dimension electrical machines for generator operation
Design control for maximum power point tracking
Optimize energy yield in variable-speed generator systems
description_en: Covers electrical machines and control of generator systems for renewable energy generation, including maximum power point tracking.

competencies: Implement control methods for electrical drives on microcontrollers
Manage real-time tasks, interrupts and communication
Discretize controllers and handle fixed-point arithmetic
Realize current control for converter-fed machines
description_en: Teaches implementation of electrical drive control on microcontrollers including real-time task management and fixed-point arithmetic.

competencies: Explain operational mechanisms of power network system management
Identify actors and interactions in technical and market domains
Apply regulatory frameworks to network operator tasks
Manage congestion, voltage control and grid restoration processes
description_en: Covers operational system management of electrical power networks including regulatory frameworks, grid operation and planning processes.

competencies: Apply EMC measurement methods to analyze EMC problems
Conduct EMC investigations in time and frequency domains
Measure scattering and transfer impedance matrices experimentally
Evaluate experimental EMC results critically
description_en: A seminar applying electromagnetic compatibility measurement methods through experiments to analyze and evaluate EMC problems.

competencies: Address system integration questions for power electronics
Quantify interactions between power electronics and the surrounding system
Apply modeling, simulation and hardware-in-the-loop methods
Represent a complete system including power-electronic assemblies and control
description_en: A seminar on system integration of power electronics using modeling, simulation and hardware-in-the-loop for renewable energy and electromobility.

competencies: Explain the physics and conversion principles of wind energy
Design wind turbines using aerofoil theory
Calculate power curves and part-load behaviour of wind turbines
Assess grid integration and economics of wind power plants
description_en: Covers conversion, design and grid integration of wind turbines for electricity generation including aerodynamics and economics.

competencies: Develop and implement electrical circuits on printed circuit boards
Select components and materials for PCB design
Place and route components considering layout constraints
Apply strategies for error detection and correction in manufactured boards
description_en: Teaches the design and manufacturing of printed circuit boards from conceptualization through component placement to error correction.

competencies: Design and analyze analog and mixed-signal electronic systems
Characterize noise and nonlinearities in analog circuits
Design frequency-conversion systems, oscillators and PLLs
Analyze amplifiers at transistor level using analytical and simulation methods
description_en: Provides design and analysis of analog and mixed-signal systems including noise, amplifiers, oscillators, PLLs and data converters.

competencies: Design complex image processing and understanding systems
Apply algorithms for 3D measurement, motion analysis and object tracking
Implement biometric and face analysis recognition techniques
Develop image evaluation systems for current research applications
description_en: Applies advanced image processing and understanding to research topics such as 3D measurement, motion analysis, tracking and biometrics.

competencies: Select and dimension antennas for specific applications
Optimize antennas using perturbation and variational calculus
Apply near-field to far-field transformation
Analyze microwave circuits using three-dimensional modal analysis
description_en: Covers selection, dimensioning and optimization of antennas using variational and perturbation methods and modal analysis.

competencies: Apply the main steps of digital chip design
Create manufacturable chip layouts with industrial tools
Perform floorplanning, placement, clock tree synthesis and routing
Design for testability using BIST, boundary scan and ATPG
description_en: Teaches the fundamentals of digital chip design from partitioning and placement to routing, verification and design for testability.

competencies: Describe multimodal signals and their information content
Compare early and late sensor fusion architectures
Apply Markov fusion networks for multimodal pattern recognition
Handle uncertainty in sensor fusion systems
description_en: A seminar on sensor fusion architectures and multimodal pattern recognition for human-machine interaction under uncertainty.

competencies: Apply genetic and evolutionary algorithms for global optimization
Select and implement suitable algorithm structures for a task
Design fitness functions and application-specific components
Validate optimization results in engineering and biomedical problems
description_en: Teaches the application and implementation of genetic and evolutionary algorithms for global optimization in engineering and biomedicine.

competencies: Use a three-dimensional field simulator for high-frequency structures
Model structures with a CAD system and optimize meshing
Choose meshing strategies and solver parameters for efficient solutions
Automate parameter scans in field simulation
description_en: A laboratory using a 3D field simulator to numerically analyze typical high-frequency structures with optimized meshing and solver settings.

competencies: Carry out a complete pattern recognition task from data to interpretation
Apply linear and nonlinear classifiers and Bayes classification
Use clustering, self-organizing maps and information fusion
Apply deep learning and transfer learning to recognition problems
description_en: Teaches machine learning, deep learning and information fusion to carry out complete pattern recognition tasks in industrial and medical applications.

competencies: Explain concepts for object detection, ranging and angular positioning
Describe the operation of primary and secondary radar systems
Apply signal processing methods for radar
Assess physical propagation effects in radar systems
description_en: Covers radar concepts and systems for object detection, ranging and positioning including the required signal processing and propagation effects.

competencies: Apply principles of cognitive intelligence in practical programs
Build models of acoustic and written language as representation models
Implement cognitive systems in engineering applications
Handle meaning assignment and data in cognitive systems
description_en: A seminar on the practical application of cognitive intelligent systems including language modeling and realization in engineering systems.
